---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new detection pattern or feature
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Description

A clear description of the feature or detection pattern you'd like to add.

## Use Case

Why is this needed? What attack or malware campaign does it address?

## Proposed Solution

How should this work?

For new detection patterns, include:
- Pattern regex
- Example malicious code that should be detected
- Example legitimate code that should NOT be detected
- Suggested severity level
- References (blog posts, advisories, etc.)

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you've thought about.

## Additional Context

Any other context, links, or references.
